rows.notes: Very clear centered year at top of page, bold ink and distinct from amounts. No monetary columns present on this line.
Clearly written title under the year. No amounts on this line; horizontal rule beneath confirms it is a section header.
Description legible. Three vertical ruling lines used to align numbers; pounds column clearly shows '10', shillings '0', pence '0'. All currency values valid.

Text is heavily struck-through (line crossed out). Amount columns align to '50 0 0' (faint but consistent with column lines). Because of the strikethrough and slightly smudged first letter of description, confidence reduced though numeric columns are reasonably aligned.

Description mostly legible though the name after 'Contract Fee.' is ambiguous in lettering; the amounts read clearly as '2' pounds, '2' shillings, '0' pence based on alignment with ruling lines and spacing. Values are within valid ranges.

Description readable though word after 'Galpin' could be 'Ord' or 'Oct' — chosen as 'Ord' based on letter shapes. Amount columns clearly show '14 19 8' aligned to the three ruling lines; pence 8 is unambiguous.

rows.description: Glastonbury School. 5/4 repaym't by act of Symes Accomt
rows.notes: Handwriting for the descriptive clause after 'Glastonbury School' is moderately cramped and abbreviations present; interpreted as a repayment note. Numeric columns read as '5' pounds, '5' shillings, '0' pence — the shillings digit is slightly crowded but clearly within 0-19 range.

Description contains parenthetical numeric annotations; the principal monetary entry aligned in the pounds/shillings/pence columns reads as '154 18 6'. There is small overwritten/adjacent notation '133.18.0' which appears to be earlier figure — chosen the clearly-aligned 154/18/6 as the main amount. All currency values valid.

rows.description: —— (two lower lines crossed out; illegible description)
rows.notes: There are two further lines of text that have been heavily struck-through (mid-page) and their lettering is largely unreadable. No clear amounts can be read in the three monetary columns for these struck lines; recorded as entries with empty amounts. Low confidence due to heavy crossing-out and ink obscuration.

Final total at lower right clearly written as '187 5 2' (pounds, shillings, pence). There is an earlier struck-out subtotal immediately above it, but the visible clear total is interpreted as the final sum. All numeric components validate against currency rules.
